---
title: "About Me"
---

## Education

**M.S. Biostatistics and Bioinformatics**  
Emory University, Atlanta, GA — Expected 2026

**B.S. [Your Degree]**  
University of Liverpool — 2024

---

## Research Experience

**Graduate Research Assistant**  
Emory CIDMATH, Emory University — 2024 to Present
Developing Bayesian hierarchical models in Stan to characterize viral shedding dynamics by integrating heterogeneous longitudinal datasets extracted from published literature using an LLM-powered AI pipeline.

**Graduate Research Assistant**  
Goizueta Brain Health Institute, Emory University — 2025 to Present  
Analyzing resting-state EEG biomarkers to differentiate MCI from Alzheimer's Disease using spectral power, wavelet coherence, and complexity features.
---

## Skills

| Category       | Tools                                      |
|----------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Programming    | Python, R, SQL                             |
| Visualization  | ggplot2, plotly, Shiny, flexdashboard      |
| Statistics     | Regression, survival analysis, Wilcoxon    |
| Other          | GitHub, R Markdown, LaTeX                  |

---

## Contact
- GitHub: [github.com/hww228](https://github.com/hww228)
